meaning: n.主管 handicap 的裁判人员
examples: He can teach the scratch player as well as the high handicapper.
You see, I was once a frustrated, forty-handicapper like many of you out there.
Hollywood handicapper David Poland predicted that she would not only get nominated for the best-actress Oscar, but that she'd win the statuette in February.
Any serious handicapper would doubt the ability to place three winning bets in a row.
"I do wonder who is applying for the post of UK Handicapper General at the moment, " he said.
